offer: For property managers processing 5–15 tenant leases/month, inconsistent compliance tracking causes potential legal issues and penalties. We automate compliance summaries instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent compliance tracking leads to potential legal issues and penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers

Develop a short demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities

Set default reminder schedules for compliance
Enable CSV import for existing lease data
Facilitate one-click export of simple reports
